global_summary: This week the company must earn 103 planned work-days — 43 were due by today but just 7 are booked, leaving all nine jobs behind after last week's misses (Jul 13-19). Focus on final inspections at Ginger Brown and Clifford Clack, plus Karim's foundation pour.

22NxUEJKTj6C.name: Ginger Brown
22NxUEJKTj6C.text: Behind this week's single planned day; final building inspection still open (Slip: 57%). Schedule the final building inspection now — its Mon Jul 20 window already passed.

22PCPuWPndkt.name: Clifford Clack — Gym Addition
22PCPuWPndkt.text: Zero of ten planned days earned this week (Slip: 71%). Install gutters and final cleaning by Thu Jul 23, then final building inspection by Fri Jul 24.

22PK9BhEJtZn.name: Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458)
22PK9BhEJtZn.text: Behind: just one of 14 due work-days earned this week (Slip: 50%). Tile install slipped to Mon Jul 27; get waterproofing and tiles moving.

22P2cmNJZcwJ.name: Stephanie and Marc Felton
22P2cmNJZcwJ.text: Behind: one of five due work-days earned this week (Slip: 37%). Second-floor paint change order slipped to Wed Jul 29 — restart interior finishes to recover.

22PL9RSbYNs9.name: Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496)
22PL9RSbYNs9.text: Behind: none of three due work-days earned this week (Slip: 37%). Wall insulation and energy report both slipped to next week; pick a sheetrock contractor now.

22Nx8Uut2Qxs.name: Kyle Aubry - Project 01
22Nx8Uut2Qxs.text: Nearly on pace — three of four due days earned, +4 tasks done (Slip: 42%). Install interior doors by Thu Jul 23 and plumbing trim by Sat Jul 25.

22P2j3sQMKqz.name: Katie Holmes & Sean Springs
22P2j3sQMKqz.text: Behind: none of three due work-days earned this week (Slip: 24%). Start tile install (no backsplash) by Fri Jul 24 to keep the week alive.

22PGVNmUgLww.name: Martha Cockrell (CNG-20251199)
22PGVNmUgLww.text: Slightly behind, one due day unearned this week (Slip: 19%). Start insulation execute by Fri Jul 24 — siding already slipped to August.

22PMwhcSuqJD.name: Karim-Merchant
22PMwhcSuqJD.text: Two of six week tasks done, +3 today (Slip: 27%). Finish rebar by Tue Jul 21 and pre-pour inspection Wed Jul 22 before Thu Jul 23 concrete pour.
